text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate... Chocolates, huh? Valentine's
chocolates for Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Are you planning to make chocolate from scratch
for your trainer, Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Dia. Yeah, I was going to, but do you
think they'll turn out good enough? My
chocolates are nowhere near the pro level...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course they will! Even if they're not on par with
a professional, the chocolates you make are
incredible.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow, this chocolate tastes amazing!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It better! I worked really hard on them since I
didn't want to lose out to the super high-quality
stuff you give me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Trying to outdo you each year has
definitely helped hone my skills.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of embarrassing to give chocolates to
anyone other than you, though.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You can't let your shyness stop you, Kita! It's only
right to give proper thanks to the person who's
been taking care of you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're always telling me how grateful you are for
being able to run with confidence because your
trainer's always by your side.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I feel that seasonal events like this are the best
time to convey the depth of your feelings in the
form of a gift!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The depth of my feelings. I see... You're right!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This is no time to be embarrassed! I owe so much
to Trainer, after all!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do this! I'm gonna make the best
chocolates in the world!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've reserved the gymnasium all to myself, so now
I can focus on making a huge chocolate sculpture!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to figure out what kind of chocolate I
want for the base first...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right, it should be dark to represent the ground
and have a velvety creaminess to balance out the
crunchiness of the snow pillars.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And to top it all off!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate the color of pure snow! And this won't
be just powder snow but a proper blizzard! The
decorations have gotta look a little wild too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's complete! I've put all my feelings of gratitude
into chocolate form!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer! Please accept my
unmatched gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I call this "The Blizzard of the Northern
Wasteland"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolate sculpture she reveals looks straight
out of an enka song. A wild blizzard of white
chocolate rages atop a layer of dark chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't just look amazing, by the way! It tastes
great too, so go ahead and dig in!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if this is enough to show you just how
thankful I really am, but please help yourself and
eat away!
choice_data_list: Thank you! But, uh... This is kinda big, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, I guess you're right. Things got a little
out of control as I was making it...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry! Whatever you don't finish, I'll
help bring up to your room. That's right! This
chocolate comes with free delivery service!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I enjoy Kitasan Black's enka-themed
chocolate creation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Kitasan Black brings the
leftovers to my room. I certainly won't be in need
of more chocolate for a while.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I had a feeling that might be the case, so I
made something else that's a little easier to eat.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I figured this would be easier to deal with. Erm...
here you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the box to find a chocolate figure shaped
like Kitasan Black inside.
choice_data_list: Why is it shaped like you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's supposed to be a joke... I'm Kitasan Black, so I
decided it'd be funny to make something with
black cocoa powder. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, thanks to you, I've finally become the
wonderful Umamusume I've always wanted to be.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
They're nothing fancy or anything, but I'm really
proud of how rich they taste! Take your time and
savor them!
choice_data_list: Thank you. By the way, what is this one called?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Well, since the big one there is called "The
Blizzard of the Northern Wasteland"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pauses and thinks for a while before
continuing.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Okay, I've got it! This one is...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: "The One I Can Never Forget"!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Y-you think so? I hear that a lot with my gifts.
Guess I'm the type to go big or go home. Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all said and done, the chocolates are a real
delicacy. They're simple and sweet and fill my
whole body with joy.
